shopping_358.POSSIBLE REASONS FOR FAILURE: The objective was to "Buy snacks," but the agent only added the item to the shopping cart and did not proceed with the actual purchase (checkout process). Adding to cart is not equivalent to buying.
shopping_358.REFLECTION: In the future, when the objective is to "buy" an item, ensure the entire purchase process is completed, which includes adding the item to the cart, navigating to the cart/checkout, and confirming the order. Do not stop after merely adding an item to the cart.
shopping_358.raw_response:
POSSIBLE REASONS FOR FAILURE:
The objective was to "Buy snacks," but the agent only added the item to the shopping cart and did not proceed with the actual purchase (checkout process). Adding to cart is not equivalent to buying.

REFLECTION:
In the future, when the objective is to "buy" an item, ensure the entire purchase process is completed, which includes adding the item to the cart, navigating to the cart/checkout, and confirming the order. Do not stop after merely adding an item to the cart.
